query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM pro_rata;
SELECT nrOperacao, CAST(comissao AS DECIMAL(10,4)) as comissao, CAST(valorFinanciado AS DECIMAL(12,2)) as valorFinanciado, CAST(vlr AS DECIMAL(10,4)) as vlr, qtdFaltaReceber FROM pro_rata LIMIT 5;
